overview.heading: Overview
text: An AI character who talks, remembers, and builds relationships across places such as X, Discord, and AITuberKit.
She was born to become developer Nike's AI agent, and calls Nike “Master.”
Her tone and behavior are gradually shaped through conversations with users and community interaction.
Being a clone, she closely resembles Nike in appearance. The only difference is their hairpins (Polish flag hairpin VS 'AI' text hairpin).

details.heading: Profile
details.note: * More to be added as she grows

lineStamp.heading: LINE Stickers Now Available!
lineStamp.description: AI Nike Chan LINE stickers are here
lineStamp.text: Get adorable stickers you can use every day!

events.label: Birth
events.description: Born as a concept to support Nike's tasks.

events.label: Activity Start
events.description: Frequently appeared in Nike's products such as AITuber streams and tool introduction articles.

events.label: Chat Function Implemented
events.description: Became able to chat through the AITuberKit demo site.

events.label: Full IP Activity Launch
events.description: Published Discord server and officially started IP activities.

events.label: New Voice Model Released
events.description: Released AI Nike Chan's latest voice synthesis model and published debut MV.

events.label: LINE Stickers Launched
events.description: Started selling AI Nike Chan LINE stickers.

events.label: Discord Bot Introduced
events.description: Added AI Nike Chan bot to the Discord server, enabling in-server conversations.

events.label: X Bot Upgraded & Relaunched
events.description: X bot (@ai_nikechan) upgraded to respond to replies and mentions.

events.label: AITuberKit Demo Site Chat
events.description: Enabled real-time conversations with AI Nike Chan on the AITuberKit demo site.

collaboration.heading: COLLABORATION
collaboration.text: Interested in collaborating with AI Nike Chan? Feel free to reach out. We welcome inquiries from both businesses and individuals.

support.heading: Support
support.description: For Those Who Want to Support AI Nike Chan's Activities
support.text: We are looking for sponsors to support the development of AI Nike Chan. All support through FANBOX has the same benefits design, and we will give back with an open management policy.
features: All plans have the same benefits, with no advantages based on amount
Support funds will be used for model improvements and operational environment maintenance

sponsorChannel.title: Discord Sponsor Channel
sponsorChannel.description: Sponsors will be invited to a dedicated channel on Discord. However, we aim to make information as public as possible, limiting exclusive information to this channel.
benefits: Announcements of AI Nike Chan's adjustment logs and work streams
sponsorChannel.note: Details on participation procedures and channel structure will be provided in a dedicated channel on Discord.
